sections.heading: Ten specialties,one quiet building.
sections.text: Chapter I. ✦ DEPARTMENTS Ten specialties, one quiet building. A full index of what Bright Specialized Clinics offers on Prince Faisal Bin Fahd Road in Al Khobar, since 2018.

sections.heading: Department I — Dermatology & Laser
sections.text: Chapter I. SKIN SCIENCE UNDER DR. MARINA NADDAF Department I — Dermatology & Laser Medical and cosmetic dermatology led by Dr. Marina Naddaf — AAD member since 2004, Canadian Laser Diploma, twenty-five years across the Gulf. Restrained protocols that age gracefully. PRICING From SAR 199 · packages available SERVICES (9) 01 Hydrafacial 02 Laser Hair Removal 03 Plasma · PRP Therapy 04 Skin Rejuvenation 05 Acne Therapy 06 Pigmentation & Brown Spots 07 Mesotherapy 08 Chemical Peeling 09 Microneedling BOOK THIS DEPARTMENT ON WHATSAPP →

sections.heading: Department II — Plastic & Aesthetic Surgery
sections.text: Chapter II. MAXILLOFACIAL UNDER DR. HASSAN NAZZAL Department II — Plastic & Aesthetic Surgery Aesthetic and reconstructive surgery led by Dr. Hassan Nazzal — Jordanian Board, Royal College of Surgeons in Ireland Fellowship. Restraint and proportion over volume. PRICING Consultation-based · SAR 800–8,000+ SERVICES (7) 01 Full-face Filler 02 Lip Filler 03 Botox 04 Thread Lift 05 Body Contouring 06 Maxillofacial Surgery 07 Reconstructive consultation BOOK THIS DEPARTMENT ON WHATSAPP →

sections.heading: Department III — Cosmetic Dentistry
sections.text: Chapter III. SMILE DESIGN & HOLLYWOOD SMILE Department III — Cosmetic Dentistry Cosmetic and restorative dentistry. Hollywood Smile, veneers, whitening, dental implants, and gummy-smile correction — designed around your face proportions. PRICING From SAR 250 · Hollywood Smile up to SAR 16,000 SERVICES (9) 01 Hollywood Smile · Veneers 02 Teeth Whitening (chair-side & laser) 03 Gummy Smile Correction 04 Dental Implants 05 Composite Fillings 06 Crowns & Bridges 07 Root Canal · Endodontics 08 Periodontics 09 Paediatric Dentistry BOOK THIS DEPARTMENT ON WHATSAPP →

sections.heading: Department IV — OB/GYN & Women's Health
sections.text: Chapter IV. DISCREET, WOMEN-ONLY CONSULTATIONS Department IV — OB/GYN & Women's Health Gynecology, intimate health, and women's wellness led by Dr. Nadeen Kabboura. Female-only sessions available on request — booking via WhatsApp 0557337555. PRICING Consultation from SAR 250 SERVICES (4) 01 Gynecological consultation 02 Intimate health treatments 03 Postnatal recovery 04 Women's wellness check-ups BOOK THIS DEPARTMENT ON WHATSAPP →

sections.heading: Department V — Paediatrics
sections.text: Chapter V. FAMILY MEDICINE FOR THE YOUNGEST Department V — Paediatrics General paediatrics and family-coordinated care. Convenient for families booking multiple members on the same visit. PRICING Consultation from SAR 200 SERVICES (3) 01 Paediatric general consultation 02 Vaccination & developmental check-ups 03 Paediatric dermatology referral BOOK THIS DEPARTMENT ON WHATSAPP →

sections.heading: Department VI — Bariatric Surgery
sections.text: Chapter VI. WEIGHT & METABOLIC MANAGEMENT Department VI — Bariatric Surgery Bariatric and metabolic surgical consultations. Pre-operative workup, surgical procedures, and structured post-operative follow-up. PRICING Quote at consultation SERVICES (3) 01 Bariatric consultation 02 Sleeve & bypass procedures 03 Pre/post-operative care BOOK THIS DEPARTMENT ON WHATSAPP →

sections.heading: Department VII — Day Surgery
sections.text: Chapter VII. SAME-DAY SURGICAL PROCEDURES Department VII — Day Surgery Outpatient surgical procedures in a fully equipped facility. Discharge same day in most cases. PRICING Quote at consultation SERVICES (2) 01 Outpatient surgical consultations 02 Minor surgical procedures BOOK THIS DEPARTMENT ON WHATSAPP →

sections.heading: Department VIII — Interventional Radiology
sections.text: Chapter VIII. IMAGE-GUIDED DIAGNOSIS & THERAPY Department VIII — Interventional Radiology Diagnostic imaging and image-guided minimally invasive procedures. Available by referral. PRICING Referral-based SERVICES (2) 01 Diagnostic imaging 02 Image-guided interventions BOOK THIS DEPARTMENT ON WHATSAPP →

sections.heading: Department IX — Psychiatry
sections.text: Chapter IX. CONFIDENTIAL MENTAL-HEALTH CARE Department IX — Psychiatry Adult psychiatric consultation in a private, discreet setting. Bilingual care. PRICING Consultation from SAR 350 SERVICES (2) 01 Psychiatric consultation 02 Therapy referral BOOK THIS DEPARTMENT ON WHATSAPP →

sections.heading: Department X — Laser Centre
sections.text: Chapter X. DEDICATED LASER & ENERGY-BASED THERAPIES Department X — Laser Centre Dedicated laser room with SFDA-registered devices spanning hair removal, vascular, pigmentation, and skin resurfacing. PRICING Per-session from SAR 250 SERVICES (5) 01 Laser hair removal — all skin types 02 Vascular laser (broken capillaries) 03 Pigmentation laser 04 Laser skin resurfacing 05 Laser tattoo removal BOOK THIS DEPARTMENT ON WHATSAPP →

sections.heading: Equipmentwe trust.
sections.text: Chapter V. TECHNOLOGY Equipment we trust. Internationally certified technology, chosen because it is effective and safe. SFDA-registered laser fleet Hair removal, vascular, pigmentation, and skin resurfacing devices — all SFDA registered. Hydrafacial system Three-step facial protocol — cleanse, extract, hydrate. RF / Ultrasound body contouring Non-invasive body shaping for face and body. Chair-side teeth-whitening unit In-clinic whitening with same-day results. Maxillofacial surgical suite Full surgical setup for Dr. Hassan Nazzal's procedures.

sections.heading: Not sure which department fits?
sections.text: Not sure which department fits? WhatsApp us — we will help you book with the right specialist. BOOK ON WHATSAPP
